{{Quote|To present your passport now, hairless one.|The Lexlar Odeon Farnish|<ref name="TRG1" />}}
The '''Lexlars''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]], [[Hair/Legends|hair]]-covered [[Humanoid/Legends|hominid]]. [[Odeon Farnish]] was a three-[[Foot/Legends|feet]]-tall, [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]]-speaking Lexlar who worked as a [[Customs Inspector|customs inspector]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. At one point, Farnish referred to another being as "hairless one."<ref name="TRG1" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Lexlar species was introduced in the [[1987]] [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game (first edition)|rulebook]] for the first edition of [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''. The book compared the appearance of the Lexlar Odeon Farnish to [[Wikipedia:Cousin Itt|Cousin Itt]],<ref name="TRG1" /> a character introduced in the [[Wikipedia:1964 in television|1964]]–[[Wikipedia:1966 in television|1966]] television series [[Wikipedia:The Addams Family (1964 TV series)|''The Addams Family'']].<ref name="EWcom">{{WebCite|url=https://ew.com/tv/felix-silla-cousin-itt-the-addams-family-dies-at-84|text=Felix Silla, the original Cousin Itt on ''The Addams Family'', dies at 84|author=Maureen Lee Lenker|date=2021-04-16|work=[[Entertainment Weekly Books|Entertainment Weekly]]|quote=Cousin Itt was original to The Addams Family series, which ran from 1964 to 1966 on ABC.|archivedate=20241115195138}}</ref>
